"D:\ARM\9 2020-q2-update\bin\arm-none-eabi-gcc.exe" -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mthumb-interwork -mfloat-abi=hard -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -Og -g3 -Wall -Wextra -Wswitch-default -fstack-usage --specs=nano.specs -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -std=gnu11  -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--print-memory-usage -T D:/Projekty/ElektronikaiOprogramowanie/Suncontroller/SuncontrollerSoftware/ECO_MainControllerMCU/STM32F401CCUX_BOOT.ld -Wl,-Map=D:/Projekty/ElektronikaiOprogramowanie/Suncontroller/SuncontrollerSoftware/ECO_MainControllerMCU/boot.map CMakeFiles/SuncontrollerCPU_boot.dir/BootloaderSrc/bootloader.c.obj CMakeFiles/SuncontrollerCPU_boot.dir/Core/Startup/startup_stm32f401ccux.s.obj CMakeFiles/SuncontrollerCPU_boot.dir/Core/Src/system_stm32f4xx.c.obj  -o SuncontrollerCPU_boot.elf
